caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is captured in a medium shot against a plain, dark gray background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved tunic featuring small floral embroidery along the neckline and a thin black necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, a small circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as she talks. Her head tilts slightly and her eyes blink as she continues her address. There are no other people or objects present in the scene, and the background remains static and unchanging across the progression of the frames.
